============
Front Matter
============

Information about the Dogpile Cache Workbench project.

Project Homepage
================

Dogpile Cache Workbench is hosted on GitHub at https://github.com/19939138357/dogpile-cache-workbench.

Releases and project status are available on Pypi at https://pypi.python.org/pypi/dogpile.cache.

The local documentation source lives in this repository under ``docs/build``.

Installation
============

Install released versions of dogpile.cache from the Python package index with `pip <http://pypi.python.org/pypi/pip>`_ or a similar tool::

    pip install dogpile.cache

Bugs
====

Bugs and feature enhancements for this edition should be reported on the `GitHub
issue tracker
<https://github.com/19939138357/dogpile-cache-workbench/issues/>`_.
